title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 287.124 - Department of labor and industrial relations, certification of employer safety programs, when
text:
287.124.  Department of labor and industrial relations, certification of employer safety programs, when. — The department of labor and industrial relations shall complete all applications filed prior to January 1, 1994, from employers for certification of employer safety programs.
(L. 1993 S.B. 251 § 36) 
Effective 1-01-94
